objective: Consume the completed Olares-first AI workflow authority chain through Packet 041 and decide whether the default Operations Visibility business lane should now resume as the next bounded follow-on from the Olares-resident posture.
dependency_note: Packet 041 parked the Olares-first AI workflow lane at a stable published boundary after the admitted minimal MCP trio plus `apex-jobs` slice passed, was published, and the host mirror returned to clean parity. The next truthful question is whether the default Operations Visibility business lane should now resume as the next bounded follow-on from the Olares-resident posture.
decision_requirements: Reopen only the default Operations Visibility business lane, not a generic product-wide implementation frontier.
Preserve GitHub as canonical, `/home/olares/code/apex` as the authoritative host mirror, and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as observe-only historical evidence.
Preserve the current minimal MCP trio plus `apex-jobs` and packet-handoff governance as the active Olares operating model unless a later packet proves insufficiency.

Keep AI-services expansion, `ai_tasks` bridge work, hosting transition, auth widening, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, and old-clone mutation closed by default.
Select exactly one later bounded planning packet as the next candidate rather than reopening generic implementation immediately.
decision_rationale: The Olares-first AI workflow lane is now complete through Packet 041, with the host mirror clean and no active Olares infrastructure packet remaining.
The cutover and authority surfaces still identify Operations Visibility as the default business follow-on once the Olares-resident posture is stable.

Packet 035 intentionally deferred Operations Visibility only for the bounded Olares-first relay-reduction tranche; Packet 041 closure means that tranche has now completed without opening any new insufficiency-driven infrastructure requirement.
A later bounded planning packet is still required so the first post-041 business-delivery slice remains explicit and controlled.
